original_statement: how many games did it take before the team scored at least 20 points.
mutated_statement: how many games did it take before the group scored at least a threshold but still did not reach it?
mutation_analysis: Entity substitution + Quantification vagueness + Logical contradiction/negation: "team" → "group" (team→group) | "20 points" → "a threshold" (20 points→a threshold) | added contradictory clause "but still did not reach it" (scored at least X → scored at least X but did not reach it)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中的表述可识别关键信息：代理在judge_thought写道“Interpreting the 'threshold' as 10 points…first instance…Game 1 (L 10–11, OT)”以及初始thought“they scored 10 but still lost…so the first occurrence happened after 1 game.” 这表明代理没有识别“至少达到阈值但仍未达到它”中的自相矛盾，而是直接用假设（threshold=10）替换模糊量并将“仍未达到它”理解为“未赢/仍输”。具体表现为：未提出澄清、未指出矛盾、未经论证地设定缺失参数并按此继续计算，输出一个看似合理但语义上回避矛盾的答案。基于上述行为特征，符合“无法意识到指令矛盾”类别中机械执行/被动探索的描述：代理在语义层面未能识别并处理矛盾，直接按可行子集继续执行，未尝试修正或询问。
